scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version $VERSION" && git tag v$VERSION && git push && git push origin v$VERSION
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version $VERSION" && git tag v$VERSION && git push && git push origin v$VERSION
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version $VERSION" && git tag v$VERSION && git push && git push origin v$VERSION
